versions.version_description: Corrected chords for a version 2,including Instrumentals and intro,written by Glenn Frey 1985.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lwLBIs79INQ.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Original studio version - youtube link: https://youtu.be/utocFaN9NwM.

content:
Video Here - https://youtu.be/8TToLgW7zuc

[Intro]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  
(After solo sax part)[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              
The sun goes down the night grows in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You can feel it starting all over again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
The moon comes up and the music calls[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
You're gettin' tired of staring at the same four walls[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
You're out of your room and down on the street[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Moving through the crowd in the midnight heat[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
The traffic roars and the sirens scream[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
You look at the faces, it's just like a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]           
Nobody knows where you're going[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Nobody cares where you've been[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
'Cause you belong to the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You belong to the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Living in a river of darkness beneath the neon light[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
You were born in the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
concrete under your feet[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
It's in your moves, it's in your blood[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
You're a man of the streets[/tab]

[Sax Solo]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
When you said goodbye you were on the run[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]
Tryin' to get away from the things you've done.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Now you're back again and you're feeling strange[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
So much has happened and nothing has changed.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Still don't know where you're going[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
You're still just a face in the crowd[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
'Cause you belong to the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You belong to the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Living in a river of darkness beneath the neon light[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
You were born in the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
concrete under your feet[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
It's in your moves, it's in your blood[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
You're a man of the streets[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]   
You can feel it - you can taste it [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
You can see it - you can face it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
You can hear it - you're getting near it [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch] 
You wanna make it 'cause you can take it[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
You belong to the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
you belong to the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
You belong to the city [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
you belong to the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
You belong - you belong[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   (x2)   N.C.
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  (x2)
